post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 260: Communist Mafia - Better Dead than Red
Rules
  • Rules
    • 1.1: Read the rules. All of them. Read them multiple times if necessary.
    • 1.2: Do not post at night.
    • 1.3: You may PM me at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification.
    • 1.4: Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from me, including role PMs. Do not refer to private conversations with the moderator in any way unless given permission.
    • 1.5: Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the mods in charge, unless I specifically allow you to do so.
    • 1.6: You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others. This does not include adding extra spaces.
    • 1.7: Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
    • 1.8: If you are not a living participant of the game, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
    • 1.9: Do not advocate for breaking the rules.
    • 1.10: Do not use the colors red (#FF0000), blue (#0000FF), green (#00FF00), or anything that appears similar, as these colors are used for modding purposes.
    • 1.11: Confirm by posting Better Dead than Red
  • Voting/Hanging
    • 2.1: Post votes in code tags in the format [code]Vote: <insert player here>[/code]
      Since AoPS does not distinguish between usernames with different capitalizations, the capitalization of the player name does not matter. A proper vote looks like 
      Vote: fdas
    • 2.2: Votes may not be placed in hide tags.
    • 2.3: Improperly made votes will not be counted under any circumstances. It does not matter if it is the end of the game hammer and everyone revealed their roles. Hint: don’t reveal your roles and declare victory until I made the official end of the game post.
    • 2.4: You may vote for no hang to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post 
      Vote: No Hang
    • 2.5: You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, though it is appreciated if you do so. Unvote in the format 
      Vote: Unvote

      An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
    • 2.6: Spell the username of the player you wish to vote for exactly. Do not use nicknames.
    • 2.7: If at any point in a day more than half of the votes are for a single player, that player will be hanged. It will then immediately be twilight.
    • 2.8: If at any point in a day at least half of the votes are for no hang, then there will be no hang. It will then be twilight.
    • 2.9: If the deadline is met and no person is hanged, it will be considered no hang and will proceed to be twilight.
    • 2.10: The moment the deadline passes, no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post.
    • 2.11: During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
    • 2.12: Once I post a end-of-day scene, the person hanged (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.
  • Activity
    • 3.1: Each day will be 336 hours (2 weeks). The moderator may extend the deadline for the end of the day at his/her discretion. Note that this will be unlikely.
    • 3.2: The deadlines will follow the official time
    • 3.3: The deadline will occur the very second 336 hours has occurred.
    • 3.4: The night deadline will be 72 hours after night begins.
    • 3.5: When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or his/her partner(s) (if you have them), the player will lose the chance to perform an action during that night.
    • 3.6: Any night results will be sent after the night deadline
    • 3.7: Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night.
    • 3.8: If a player does not post in a 48-hour period and he/she is not in V/LA, you will receive an in-game prod.
    • 3.9: If a player does not post in another 24-hour period after receiving an in-game prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will receive a PM prod.
    • 3.10: If a player does not post in another 48-hour period after receiving a PM prod and he/she is not in V/LA, he/she will be replaced, unless you post before the moderator finds a replacement.
    • 3.11: If a player receives 5 PM Prods, he/she will be replaced
    • 3.12: If a player is going to be V/LA, he/she must post in bold in-thread or PM me. The moderator will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long.

  • Etiquette
    • 4.1: Do not use inappropriate language.
    • 4.2: Do not make any personal attacks.
    • 4.3: Follow all of the rules.
    • 4.4: Be mature.
    • 4.5: For a minor rule infraction, players can receive up to two warnings. If a player commits an infraction after he/she has run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, he/she will be modkilled or force replaced. Please do not make me modkill you.

  • Moderators/Co-Moderators
    • 5.1: I fdas am the moderator of Mafia Game 260
    • 5.2: The not voting section is to be ignored if it contradicts any other part of the votecount
    • 5.3: If an error to the votecount is not pointed out within 5 days, the incorrect votecount will become official.
    • 5.4: The moderator may change the rules at any time.
    • 5.5: The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules.

  • Read all of the rules

Setup
This is a closed BM game.

post_rendered: The workers at the small factory town lived at peace, obediently toiling every day for 12 hours alongside their children, living an austere but meaningful life producing consumer goods to be sold by the factory owner. But one day, this peaceful life was upended by the arrival of communists in the town. Now, the people of the town must work to root out this infiltration, lest they drown by the red tide.

15p, assume 3 scum 11 town 1 wildcard.
day 1: 11t3m
day 2: 9t3m
day 3: 7t3m
day 4: 5t3m
also known as mathmatical MYLO/functional LYLO.

if we hang mafia, take a potshot, or don't.

post_rendered:
In the morning, the workers in the factory town woke up to a loud noise. As they ran outside, they saw a van which had broken down on the roadside. The people rushed up and found that the back of the van contained the dead body of NDMath who was been secretly killed during the night after having been taken into custody. The people seized the driver of the vehicle who had been taking the body away to be disposed of. After interrogating him, they discovered that there was a secret cabal arbitrarily arresting and disposing of people they believed to be subversive. Angered by this discovery, the townspeople rose up in a revolution, stirred up by the communists within their ranks.

The communist revolution soon seized control of the town, imposing a new communist regime. The communists: andy09, galaxy1220, ad333, Scipio1, Thornclaw9000, Mathletesv have taken over.

Their first order of action was to execute the oppressive capitalists, starting with the businessman mark888 and the oppressive investigator WisteriaV.

A new system of collectivization was implemented; private property was seized and distributed equally. However, living conditions soon declined, becoming even worse than before the revolution. Soon, the ambivalence of many of the remaining proletariat who were not communists turned into sedition, and in order to defend the revolution, the communists had no choice but to eliminate those who would not submit to the new order.

For a time, it seemed like they could finally embark on the road to the socialist paradise. But then, the leader of the communists, andy09, denounced galaxy1220, accusing him of harboring counterrevolutionary sentiments and being a capitalist roader. Following a vicious fight within the party, galaxy1220 was purged along with his supporters ad333 and Mathletesv. andy09 now ruled with an iron fist, but as time passed he became paranoid of those around him and had Scipio1 purged as well. At the peak of his power, andy09 died from a stroke, throwing the government into chaos. As the seniormost communist remaining, Thornclaw9000 found themselves thrust into the position of leadership, but not knowing what to do and unable to manage the growing disorder, and lacking any others to diffuse responsibility with, he soon fled to whereabouts unknown. Thus, the town was left in a state of anarchy as it became red in more ways than one.

The End.

post_rendered:
Roles
Quote:
You are a Communist. Your goal is to enlighten the proletariat of the town so that they may know the glories of communism and overthrow the capitalist oppressors. Each night you may speak with your fellow communists and choose someone to spread propaganda to by sending one member of your team. If the target is a member of the proletariat then they will be converted into a communist at the end of the night. Your spy on the anti communist committee can only be sent on a recruitment once during the game. After that, only regular communist party members may be used for recruitment.

You may speak with fellow party members here at any time.

You win when a majority of the players are communists. Long live the world revolution comrade!
Quote:
You are a member of the anti-communist committee, who is secretly a communist spy. While the anti-communist committee seeks to eliminate communism, you seek to hinder their efforts.
The role PM for an anti-communist committee member is:
Quote:
You are a member of the anti-communist committee. Your goal is to eliminate the red menace from the town. To that end, no sacrifice is too great to secure freedom. During the night, you may discuss with your fellow committee members and collectively decide on your actions. You may send someone to investigate a player to see whether they have communist leanings. You may also send someone to have a player arrested (eliminated from the game). Each action must have the support of a majority of the committee in order to be performed.

You may speak with fellow committee members here at any time.

You win when all potential communists have been eliminated. Better Dead Than Red!
Each night you may speak with your fellow communists and choose someone to spread propaganda to by sending one member of your team. If the target is a member of the proletariat then they will be converted into a communist at the end of the night. You may only be chosen to deliver the recruitment once during the game.

You may speak with fellow party members here at any time.

Quote:
You are a well connected businessman. As a respected member of the community, your credibility is beyond reproach. No one could possibly think you are a communist. At any point during the game you can choose to reveal your role publicly.

You win when all communists have been eliminated.

Quote:
You are a member of the proletariat. You are just an ordinary worker wanting to get through life while living a miserable existence going from paycheck to paycheck working for your corporate overlords. You have no power other than your vote.

You win when all threats to the people have been eliminated.

Investigation result always returns red (communist sympathies) on everyone except for the well connected businessman
The anti communist committee members must kill all players other than the two anti communist committee member and the well connected businessman in order to win.
The members of the proletariat win when all communists and committee members are dead
